description: Key stages of my professional career.

pr-4.title: Web and Mobile Developer
pr-4.description: Design and development of more than 10 web and mobile projects (e-commerce platforms and mobile applications). Implementation of REST APIs, integration of third-party services (payment, authentication, SMS), and optimization of database management.

pr-3.title: Freelance WordPress Developer
pr-3.description: Design and development of WordPress websites for various clients: theme customization, feature integration, and performance optimization.

pr-2.title: Web Application Development
pr-2.description: Design and development of an internal application for training and budget management (PHP / MySQL). Database modeling, generation of reports (PDF/Excel), and automation of tracking calculations.

pr-1.title: Mobile and Web Application Development
pr-1.description: Integrated into a development team as a full-stack developer. Contribution to several internal projects (management applications): back-end development in CodeIgniter (PHP), MySQL database management, and implementation of mobile interfaces in React Native.
